summary: Tested Player Page Improvements Batch A: PATCH endpoint, Combat Tab, Level Up Wizard with spellcasting step. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/characters/{id} correctly whitelists allowed fields and rejects invalid ones
Short rest properly spends hit dice and heals HP based on hit die size + CON mod
Long rest correctly restores HP to max, restores half hit dice (min 1), and clears resources for frontend re-init
Level-up endpoint properly handles new_spells and new_cantrips arrays, appending to existing lists
Combat Tab UI correctly displays spell slots for Wizard with clickable toggle to use/recover
Level Up Wizard spellcasting step shows spell slot progression, cantrip selection, and wizard spellbook additions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Player Page Batch A features fully tested. PATCH endpoint supports hp, conditions, inspiration, death_saves, used_spell_slots, concentrating_on, hit_dice_remaining. Combat Tab shows spell slots, resources, attacks, conditions, death saves, inspiration. Level Up Wizard has spellcasting step for Wizard with cantrip and spellbook spell selection.

backend_tests_summary.patch_endpoint: 8/8 passed - PATCH /api/characters/{id} updates HP, conditions, inspiration, death_saves, used_spell_slots, concentrating_on, hit_dice_remaining, rejects invalid fields
backend_tests_summary.short_rest_endpoint: 2/2 passed - POST /api/characters/{id}/short-rest with/without hit dice spending
backend_tests_summary.long_rest_endpoint: 3/3 passed - POST /api/characters/{id}/long-rest restores HP, hit dice, clears resources
backend_tests_summary.level_up_endpoint: 3/3 passed - POST /api/characters/{id}/level-up with new_spells and new_cantrips
backend_tests_summary.data_persistence: 1/1 passed - PATCH changes persist and verified via GET
backend_tests_summary.cleanup: 2/2 passed - Reset test characters to clean state

frontend_tests_summary.combat_tab: PASSED - data-testid='combat-tab' found with all sections
frontend_tests_summary.spell_slots: PASSED - Wizard shows Level 1 (4/4) and Level 2 (2/2) slots with clickable toggles
frontend_tests_summary.resources: PASSED - Hit Dice (d6) and Arcane Recovery with SHORT/LONG rest labels
frontend_tests_summary.attacks: PASSED - Unarmed Strike with +1 to hit and 1-1 bludgeoning damage
frontend_tests_summary.conditions: PASSED - Expandable conditions panel with all 5e conditions (Blinded, Charmed, etc.)
frontend_tests_summary.inspiration: PASSED - Clickable toggle that persists via PATCH
frontend_tests_summary.short_rest_button: PASSED - Triggers short rest, shows toast, heals HP via hit dice
frontend_tests_summary.long_rest_button: PASSED - Triggers long rest, shows toast, restores HP to max
frontend_tests_summary.level_up_wizard_step0: PASSED - Shows Continue as Wizard and Multiclass options
frontend_tests_summary.level_up_wizard_hp_method: PASSED - Take Average and Roll Hit Dice options with calculations
frontend_tests_summary.level_up_wizard_spellcasting: PASSED - Shows spell slot progression (+1 Level 2 slot), cantrip selection (0/1), spellbook additions (0/2) with Level 1 and Level 2 spell lists

features_verified.patch_death_saves: PATCH {death_saves_successes: 2, death_saves_failures: 1} updates death save counters
features_verified.short_rest_healing: Short rest with hit_dice_to_spend=1 heals HP and decrements hit_dice_remaining
features_verified.long_rest_full_restore: Long rest restores current_hit_points to max_hit_points
features_verified.level_up_spells: Level up with new_spells array appends to spells_known
features_verified.level_up_cantrips: Level up with new_cantrips array appends to cantrips_known
features_verified.combat_tab_spell_slot_toggle: Clicking spell slot toggles used state and persists via PATCH
features_verified.combat_tab_inspiration_toggle: Clicking inspiration toggles state and persists via PATCH
features_verified.level_up_wizard_spellcasting_step: Wizard level up shows spell slot progression, cantrip selection, spellbook additions
